Every day, WITI’s group chats buzz with fresh links. As part of our new Saturday send for paid readers, we’re rounding up 11 of the best.
It’s WITI, on the weekend.
Why are these interesting?
Is Anyone Using Their Tiny Balconies? [ https://substack.com/redirect/d0b4076f-a0b8-4281-90e0-4db7543005da?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (Curbed)
They don’t fit chairs, but they move units. Curbed asks the question.
On Seeing Through and Unseeing: The Hacker Mindset [ https://substack.com/redirect/503f02a8-96b8-417b-a9d1-36d6f49196a2?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (Gwern)
You’re likely not a hacker—but that doesn’t mean you shouldn’t be thinking like one. 
‘It’s All Gone’: Devastation, Survival, and Hope From the California Fires [ https://substack.com/redirect/5846b8b3-5215-4471-8264-8a70debe14cc?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (Rolling Stone)
I’d been waiting for a full, deeply-reported state of play. Thankfully, Rolling Stone sent one of the best magazine writers in the country...
